name: speech_recognize_providers
description: Real-time dictation speech-to-text providers supporting 15+ services including Groq Whisper, OpenAI, Deepgram, AssemblyAI, ElevenLabs, Google Gemini, Microsoft Azure, and local models (Whisper, NVIDIA Parakeet, Qwen ASR).
title: Dictation Model Providers
author: EnconvoAI

data.description: Ultra-fast English-only transcription powered by NVIDIA FastConformer V2. Optimized for English dictation and voice commands.

commands.name: qwen
commands.title: Qwen ASR
commands.description: Alibaba's multilingual ASR powered by Qwen3-ASR, supporting language identification and speech recognition for 30 languages and 22 Chinese dialects, with state-of-the-art accuracy among open-source ASR models

preferences.name: modelName
preferences.title: Model Name
preferences.description: The model name to use for speech recognition

data.description: Alibaba's lightweight multilingual ASR powered by Qwen3-ASR 0.6B with 4-bit quantization for minimal memory usage.

data.description: Alibaba's lightweight multilingual ASR powered by Qwen3-ASR 0.6B, supporting ZH, EN, JA, KO and more.

data.title: Qwen3 ASR 1.7B 4bit
